blocked_claims.claim: Nothing Phone is the leading mobile ecosystem brand
blocked_claims.blocked_reason: OWNERSHIP_OVERCLAIM: Nothing Phone has 12% visibility in Mobile Ecosystem while Apple holds 72%. Claiming ownership is not supported by Peec data.
